name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: Direct cash transfer to bank account for health and nutrition during pregnancy and after delivery.
howToApply: Apply at Anganwadi Center or online via PMMVY portal

name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK)
benefit: Free delivery & child care up to 1 year
description: Free delivery, medicines, diagnostics, blood transfusion, and transport for pregnant women.
howToApply: Visit any government hospital. No registration needed.

name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan (PMSMA)
benefit: Free antenatal check-ups on 9th of every month
description: Free comprehensive antenatal care on 9th of every month at all government health facilities.
howToApply: Visit nearest government health center on 9th of any month

name: Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya (KGBV)
eligibility: Girls from SC, ST, OBC, Muslim minority
description: Residential schools providing free education, boarding, and lodging for underprivileged girls.
howToApply: Contact District Education Officer or nearby KGBV school

name: Support to Training and Employment Programme (STEP)
benefit: Free skill training + job placement assistance
eligibility: Preference to women heads of families
description: Skill training in sectors like agriculture, textiles, electronics, IT, hospitality for employment.
howToApply: Apply through State Women Development Corporations

name: CBSE Single Girl Child Scholarship
description: Monthly scholarship for single girl children to encourage education.
howToApply: Apply online via CBSE Scholarship portal

name: National Widow Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension to support widows living below poverty line.
howToApply: Apply at Tehsil/Block office or online via state portal

name: Widow Daughter Scholarship Scheme
description: Financial assistance for education of daughters of widow mothers.
howToApply: Apply via state social welfare department

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Women Ownership
eligibility: Priority if house in woman's name
description: Subsidy for building/buying house. Extra preference given if property is in woman's name.
howToApply: Apply online at pmayg.nic.in or pmaymis.gov.in

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana - Women
benefit: Business loan up to ₹10 lakh at low interest
description: Collateral-free loans to women for starting or expanding small businesses.
howToApply: Apply at any bank or NBFC offering MUDRA loans

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child's education and marriage. Highest interest among government schemes.
howToApply: Open account at any post office or authorized bank

name: Stand Up India - Women Entrepreneurs
benefit: ₹10 lakh - ₹1 crore loan for women-owned businesses
description: Loans for women to start greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services or trading sector.
howToApply: Apply through Stand Up India portal or bank branch

name: Mahila Swasthya Evam Poshan (Women's Health)
eligibility: Focus on adolescent girls, pregnant women, lactating mothers
description: Regular health screenings, nutrition counseling, and supplements for women and girls.
howToApply: Visit nearest Anganwadi Center or Primary Health Center

name: One Stop Centre (Sakhi)
benefit: Free support for violence affected women - shelter, legal aid, counseling
description: Integrated support services including temporary shelter, police, legal, medical and counseling.
howToApply: Call 181 Women Helpline or visit District OSC

name: Free Legal Aid to Women
eligibility: Women with annual income below ₹3 lakh
description: Free legal advice, drafting of documents, and representation in court for eligible women.
howToApply: Contact District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) or call 15100

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (Women SHGs)
benefit: SHG formation, skill training, credit linkage, market access
eligibility: Willing to form/join Self Help Groups
description: Organizes rural women into Self Help Groups for skill training and economic activities.
howToApply: Contact Block Development Officer or NRLM Mission office

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension
description: Monthly pension for elderly women from poor families.
howToApply: Apply at Panchayat office or online via state portal

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Campaign to prevent gender-biased sex selection and ensure education for girl children.
howToApply: Visit nearest Anganwadi or government school

name: Ujjwala Yojana - Women Priority
description: Free LPG connections to BPL households with priority to women for clean cooking fuel.
howToApply: Apply at nearest LPG distributor or online

name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
benefit: Affordable hostel accommodation for working women
description: Safe and affordable hostel accommodation for working women, students and trainees.
howToApply: Apply through State Women Development Corporation
